name: chatmem
description: Repository memory, history search, and agent handoff workflows powered by the local ChatMem MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Inject repository memory, search prior work, and build handoffs across agents
interface.longDescription: Use ChatMem to hydrate Codex with repository memory at startup, search prior conversations and episodes, propose new memory candidates, and create handoff packets when work moves between agents.
defaultPrompt: Load ChatMem repo memory for this workspace before I start coding.
Search ChatMem history for how we solved this bug before.
Create a ChatMem handoff packet for Claude after this rollout.
